import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let n = parts.len()

  mut sums: List<Int> = []
  mut running = 0
  mut i = 0

  while i < n
    let part = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(p)
      p
    when None
      ""
    end
    let val = match string.parse_int(part)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    running = running + val
    sums = list.push(sums, running)
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut j = 0
  while j < sums.len()
    let v = match sums.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if j == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  println(out)
  Ok(())
end
